title: COMMUNITY MEALS AND PANTRY - 211info
text: FIRST BAPTIST CHURCH PORTLAND COMMUNITY MEALS AND PANTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides community meals, a food pantry, clothing, and personal hygiene and grooming products. Also offers a drop-in resource room. 909 SW 11th Avenue Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Meals and Resource Room: Monday/Thursday 2pm-4pm Food Pantry: Monday/Thursday 2pm-3:30pm Email (503) 228-7465 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 228-7465 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at 11th Avenue and Taylor Street by the Multnomah County Library. MAX, streetcar, and TriMet bus stops nearby. Services: Community Meals Drop In Centers Food Pantries General Clothing Provision Personal/Grooming Supplies If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FIRST BAPTIST CHURCH PORTLAND
